languages.text: Флагман оставляет судно и его мрачные тайны позади.

traits.locale_text: Флагман оставляет судно и его мрачные тайны позади.

languages.text: The flagship leaves the vessel and its dark secrets behind.
languages.original_text: Флагман оставляет судно и его мрачные тайны позади.

traits.locale_text: The flagship leaves the vessel and its dark secrets behind.
The flagship leaves the vessel and its dark secrets behind.
The flagship leaves the vessel and its dark secrets behind.

languages.text: 旗舰将那艘船以及其中隐藏的黑暗秘密一并抛在了身后。
languages.original_text: The flagship leaves the vessel and its dark secrets behind.

traits.locale_text: 旗舰将那艘船以及其中隐藏的黑暗秘密一并抛在了身后。

languages.text: La nave insignia deja atrás la nave y sus oscuros secretos.
languages.original_text: The flagship leaves the vessel and its dark secrets behind.

traits.locale_text: La nave insignia deja atrás la nave y sus oscuros secretos.

languages.text: Le vaisseau amiral se détourne de l'épave et de ses sombres secrets.
languages.original_text: The flagship leaves the vessel and its dark secrets behind.

traits.locale_text: Le vaisseau amiral se détourne de l'épave et de ses sombres secrets.

languages.text: Sancak gemisi, bu gemiyi ve karanlık sırlarını ardında bırakarak uzaklaşıyor.
languages.original_text: The flagship leaves the vessel and its dark secrets behind.

traits.locale_text: Sancak gemisi, bu gemiyi ve karanlık sırlarını ardında bırakarak uzaklaşıyor.

languages.text: Das Flaggschiff lässt das Schiff und seine dunklen Geheimnisse zurück.
languages.original_text: The flagship leaves the vessel and its dark secrets behind.

traits.locale_text: Das Flaggschiff lässt das Schiff und seine dunklen Geheimnisse zurück.

languages.text: 旗艦は、その船と、その暗く深い秘密を、後に残して去っていく。
languages.original_text: The flagship leaves the vessel and its dark secrets behind.

traits.locale_text: 旗艦は、その船と、その暗く深い秘密を、後に残して去っていく。
